title: [MTR] RegioJet SoundTransit S700
description: This pack adds a livery to the S700 train of the RegioJet carrier.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MOuVaHg-jyc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>This resource pack adds a new RegioJet paint scheme for the Siemens Sound Transit S700 train model in Minecraft. It brings the striking and recognizable bright yellow and grey design of the popular Central European operator right to your tracks.
It's a perfect, ready-to-use addition for expanding the variety of rolling stock on your world or your transit-focused servers.
